senses.en: keep safe or rescue (someone or something) from harm or danger

ex.en: Firefighters saved a child from the burning house.

senses.en: keep something so that you can use it later

ex.en: Save some pizza for your brother.
ex.ko: 동생 몫으로 피자 좀 남겨 둬.

senses.en: avoid wasting something such as time or money

ex.en: Taking the subway saves time and money.

senses.en: make a computer keep the work that you have done on it

ex.en: Don't forget to save the file before closing.
ex.ko: 닫기 전에 파일 저장하는 것 잊지 마.

senses.en: keep money so that you can use it later, especially by adding to it over time

ex.en: I'm saving up for a trip to London.
ex.ko: 런던 여행 가려고 돈을 모으고 있어.

senses.en: make it unnecessary for someone to use money, time, or effort

ex.en: Online check-in saves you a lot of hassle.
